rules.desc: the first line must be `// name: stock-app`
all 5 list rows + the back button must write key `selected` via agent.notify
all five range chips must write key `range` via agent.notify
every list row binds sys.movers fields (5 rows x fields)
Y-axis + change line use range-aware sys.stockrange
rows and chips need tap overlays (flow: Overlay containers)
tap handlers: 5 rows + 5 chips + back button
the DETAIL view must bind the live quote via sys.stock
